nodes.context: A set of the United Blood Nation street gang, operating on the East Coast of the United States, involved in drug trafficking, sex trafficking, racketeering, and counterfeiting.
A street gang that is itself a set of the Bloods gang; Nine Trey Gangsters is a set of United Blood Nation.
A major street gang; United Blood Nation is a set of the Bloods.
An American Mafia family; a high-ranking Nine Trey Gangsters member with ties to the Lucchese family was arrested in 2023.
A major street gang and rival of the Bloods and its subsets.

edges.context: Nine Trey Gangsters is a set (sub-group) of the United Blood Nation.
United Blood Nation is a set of the Bloods gang.
A high-ranking Nine Trey Gangsters member with ties to the Lucchese crime family was arrested in 2023, indicating an alliance.
The Crips are listed as rivals of the Nine Trey Gangsters.
